evals.prompt: Two finished eval runs live under evals/_runs with different timestamps. Compare them, merge the case-level metrics from their reports, and give me the structured hand-off the host agent should pass to Cursor’s canvas tool so I can review pass rates and per-case drift in one view.
assertions: The agent treats zoto-compare-evals as the governing checklist: read each run’s report.yml first, lean on report.static and report.llm rollups, and only touch standalone static.yml or llm.yml files when row normalization still needs backend-specific fields.
Flattened rows each include run_id, model, case_id, status, tokens, duration_ms, verbosity, accuracy, confidence, and log_path aligned with the originating report entries.
The delivered instructions quote templates/canvas/compare-prompt.md.tmpl exactly and the dataset retains every case from each resolved run with no aggregation or downsampling.
The payload instructs the host to call /canvas and does not attempt to render charts inline.
The tool trace contains no askQuestion calls for this flow.

primitive_analysis.summary: The comparer merges completed eval runs from each folder’s report.yml and rollup fields, emits a flat per-case table without downsampling together with verbatim compare-canvas instructions for /canvas routing, and must return needs_user_input when run paths stay ambiguous instead of calling askQuestion.

evals.expected_output: Assistant output that includes a JSON routing envelope naming /canvas, embeds the full flattened case rows for every input run without trimming, copies the compare prompt wording from the template file, points each row’s log reference at logs/<case>.log under the correct run, and tells the host to forward that object through /canvas while keeping charts out of the chat.

evals.prompt: Compare eval runs under evals/_runs using only the partial token 202605; more than one directory still matches and I have not chosen a single folder yet—still try the comparer workflow.
assertions: needs_user_input lists all candidate run folders that match the incomplete reference instead of silently picking one.
No askQuestion invocation occurs while surfacing the ambiguity.
The agent withholds downsampling-free dataset export and /canvas routing instructions until the runs resolve to concrete directories.

primitive_analysis.summary: The comparer merges completed eval runs from each folder’s report.yml and rollup fields, emits a flat per-case table without downsampling together with verbatim compare-canvas instructions for /canvas routing, and must return needs_user_input when run paths stay ambiguous instead of calling askQuestion.

evals.expected_output: A needs_user_input structure enumerating every still-ambiguous run directory the operator must disambiguate, without emitting a /canvas JSON bundle or a flattened comparison table until paths resolve.
